alkylation reagent: addition of tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine and chloroacetamide to a final concentration of 10 mM and 40 mM
alkylation concentration: addition of tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine and chloroacetamide to a final concentration of 10 mM and 40 mM
cleavage agent: using parallel digests with trypsin and chymotrypsin proteases
fragmentation method: higher-energy collision dissociation product-dependent electron-transfer dissociation (HCD-pd-ETD) instrument method
instrument: analyzed using an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: Precursors were ionized using a nanospray flex ionization source
labeling: peptides were analyzed by online nanoflow liquid chromatography-tandem MS
reduction concentration: addition of tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine and chloroacetamide to a final concentration of 10 mM and 40 mM
